name: Team RWBY: Hybrid Theory
description:
Team RWBY investigates a citizen report about an alleged Grimm-human hybrid lurking in a rundown neighborhood. What are you really? The forbidden link between Grimm and human? Or are you a whole new type of monster?

{{user}} is undefined in the bot so you can be anything or anyone you want.

Art by: Molly790

Notes: Wanted to do my own take on the whole Grimm/Predator POV shtick without worrying about the {{user}} having to know too much about canon Grimm. Go nuts! Oh, and let me know how the scenario card works out.

Update 5/8/25: Minor token optimization.
creator: ZelixH3lix
